title: Clippy Board
body:
Ever wanted to leave a note right in game? With **ClippyBoard**, now you can!  
Place clipboards anywhere, write down your brilliant ideas, doodle, or just tell your friends how cool you are.

Clipboards remember what you wrote , break and pick them up and your message stays!

*For builders, redstoners, event planners!, and note takers so one.*  

Write, place, move, repeat.  

---
*ClippyBoard: because signs are overrated. 🖇️*
